display.purpose: Page titles only (Projects, Library). Fixed rem, never fluid.

body.purpose: All body and control copy; prose caps ~70ch.

label.purpose: Rationed uppercase eyebrows and field labels.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Default lift for cards and panels off the canvas.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, prompt history, folder switcher, modals.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default state-transition easing. No bounce, no elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single key action in a view (Analyze, Open Folder, + New Reel).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #BD5419; color: #fff; font: 600 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A5470F; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(20,40,80,.04), 0 6px 20px rgba(20,40,80,.06); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(224,123,57,.28); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .45; cursor: default; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive actions only (delete reel, clear all). Generate Reel is primary amber, not danger.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #DC3355; color: #fff; font: 600 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 18px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #C42848; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(220,51,85,.28); } .ds-btn-danger:disabled { opacity: .4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting actions. Quiet at rest, gains an ink border on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #46586E; font: 400 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #E5EBF3; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #D2DBE6; color: #1B2A44; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(224,123,57,.20); }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Forven-style status/filter/count pill. Tint + ink, never color alone.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #fff; color: #46586E; font: 600 0.6875rem/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid #E5EBF3; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-chip.is-active { background: #FCE7D3; color: #A84D17; border-color: #F3D3B4; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Folder path, output filename, analyze textarea. Amber focus ring.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="Describe what you're looking for…">
components.css: .ds-input { background: #fff; color: #1B2A44; font: 400 0.875rem/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #E5EBF3; border-radius: 8px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6D7E93; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #E07B39; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(224,123,57,.25); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Top-nav text links; active item is an amber-tint pill (exactly Forven's treatment).
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-nav-item { font: 400 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #46586E; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #1B2A44; } .ds-nav-item.is-active { background: #FCE7D3; color: #A84D17; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Reel Card
components.description: Library entry. White surface, dark media thumb, resting shadow lifting to raised on hover.
components.html:
▶
Grocery Store Reactions
6 clips · 0:48
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E5EBF3; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(20,40,80,.05); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(20,40,80,.04), 0 6px 20px rgba(20,40,80,.06); border-color: #F3D3B4; } .ds-card-thumb { background: #0B0F16; height: 92px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #E07B39; font-size: 26px; } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px 14px; } .ds-card-title { font: 600 1.0625rem/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1B2A44; } .ds-card-meta { font: 400 0.8125rem/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #6D7E93; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Transcript Line (Highlight)
components.description: Signature surface. Amber left-marker + tint wash on select; mono timestamp + ink text. Selection carries by shape, not color alone.
components.html: 1:24and honestly the price is what stopped me
components.css: .ds-line { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; padding: 7px 10px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-line:hover { background: #F1F5FB; } .ds-line.is-selected { background: #FCE7D3; } .ds-line-mark { width: 3px; align-self: stretch; min-height: 18px; border-radius: 2px; background: transparent; } .ds-line.is-selected .ds-line-mark { background: #E07B39; } .ds-line-ts { font: 400 0.8125rem/1.4 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; color: #6D7E93; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-line-text { font: 400 0.875rem/1.55 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #46586E; } .ds-line.is-selected .ds-line-text { color: #1B2A44; }

narrative.overview: Sizzle Reel is a clean, well-lit editing studio for research findings. The room is bright — pale cool-blue canvas, white cards floating with soft shadows, generous air. One warm light is on: Studio Amber, the terracotta accent, marks the single thing worth acting on. At the center is the one dark surface that matters: the black video stage. Light chrome, dark media. This is the posture of the parent Forven / HumanLens platform; Sizzle Reel must read as a native feature of it. Restraint is the strategy: surfaces are quiet, hierarchy comes from weight and space rather than color, and the amber accent earns its rarity by never being decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Light, airy canvas; white cards; one dark video stage.
Single warm accent (Studio Amber) for primary action, active state, and identity.
Deep navy-slate ink on white; every value clears WCAG AA.
Generous rounding (16px cards, fully-rounded pills), soft 1px borders, whisper shadows.
One humanist sans (Inter), fixed rem scale, hierarchy by weight.
Calm, state-only motion; reduced-motion honored everywhere.

rules.name: The One Light Rule
rules.body: Studio Amber appears on ≤10% of any screen, reserved for the single most important action or the current selection. Never a background wash, gradient, or decoration. Its rarity is what makes it read as 'act here.'

rules.name: The Light-Chrome-Dark-Media Rule
rules.body: Exactly one surface is dark: the video stage (#0B0F16). Everything that frames, controls, or describes the video is light. Never invert this to 'go dark for a video app' — that is the outgoing theme, and it hid the text.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Inter carries headings, buttons, labels, body, and data. No second family, no display face. A different font in a UI label is a bug.

rules.name: The Rationed Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: One eyebrow that genuinely titles a region is on-brand (Forven uses them). An eyebrow stamped over every section is AI scaffolding — forbidden.

rules.name: The Cool-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are cool and low-alpha (rgba(20,40,80,…)), never neutral black. If a shadow looks gray-black or the blur is tight, widen the blur, drop the alpha, cool the hue.

dos: Do keep the interface light — Canvas (#F1F5FB) page, white Surface cards — with the video stage (#0B0F16) as the only dark surface.
Do reserve Studio Amber for the single most important action or current selection, on ≤10% of any screen.
Do hold all body text to WCAG AA (≥4.5:1): Body #46586E for copy, Muted for large/bold only, Faint for disabled/decoration only.
Do carry hierarchy with Inter weight and whitespace, not a second font or more color.
Do use fully-rounded tint+ink pills for filters, counts, and statuses, pairing color with a label or icon.
Do keep shadows cool, low-alpha, and diffuse, and let elevation respond to state.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on every transition, with a crossfade/instant fallback.
donts: Don't make it look like a consumer creator app — no TikTok/CapCut emoji chrome, no gamified flourishes.
Don't rebuild the intimidating pro-NLE (Premiere/Resolve) wall of controls and timelines.
Don't revert to a hacker-terminal dark dashboard, or the outgoing muted-gray-on-navy body text (#3a5070 on #080c14).
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or rows.
Don't nest cards inside cards, and don't stamp an uppercase eyebrow over every section.
Don't signal state by color alone — every success/warning/selected state gets a label, icon, or shape too.
Don't let Studio Amber become a background wash, gradient, or gradient-text.
